proofClass: analytic proof via finite Schur theorem and continuum transport theorem

transportedTraceSpace.name: X_aug
transportedTraceSpace.definition: closure Ran(R_aug) with quotient norm inf{||f||_V:R_aug f=x}

finiteAugmentedSchurRepairStatus.label: finite augmented Schur repair
finiteAugmentedSchurRepairStatus.reason: The finite augmented Schur repair theorem verifies D_aug,N>=0, K_N+R_aug,N^*D_aug,N R_aug,N>=0, the Schur range condition, and Mu annihilation on ker R_aug,N.

continuumTransportedRepairStatus.label: continuum transported repair
continuumTransportedRepairStatus.reason: The continuum transport theorem lifts the finite repair to X_aug=closure Ran(R_aug), giving a bounded nonnegative operator D_aug in the transported trace norm.

closedAugmentedPositiveFormStatus.label: closed augmented positive form
closedAugmentedPositiveFormStatus.reason: The form K+R_aug^*D_aug R_aug is continuous in the augmented graph norm and nonnegative on the dense core, hence extends as a closed nonnegative form.

proof: Use the finite augmented Schur repair theorem for the finite trace-image block.
Use the continuum transport theorem to pass that repair to X_aug.
Conclude D_aug>=0 and K+R_aug^*D_aug R_aug>=0 on the completed domain.
